arts.ttl: ‘Yes, I made a bad decision!’ - Szczęsny sends message to Barca fans
arts.sum: Szczesny says he made a bad decision in the match but is still loving life at Barcelon after coming out of retirement to play for Hansi Flick’s side . And I was never going to hide and play this game afraid of making difficult decisions and taking risk.

arts.ttl: Watch: Barcelona star in future plea to Ronald Araújo after Super Cup final
arts.sum: Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski called on Ronald Araújo to stay put at the club beyond January, during an exchange between the pair on the back of the Spanish Super Cup.…

arts.ttl: Team News: Barcelona vs. Real Betis injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Copa del Rey clash between Barcelona and Real Betis.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Rashford sets deadline for Barcelona transfer
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has set Barcelona a deadline to finalise terms as he looks to secure a Manchester United exit, FootballTransfers has been told. However, Rashford has told Barcelona that terms must be finalised by 15 January in order to ensure his representatives have enough time to negotiate a deal elsewhere if a move to Camp Nou falls through.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'reject' £40m Jhon Duran bid from Premier League rival amid Barcelona, PSG interest
arts.sum: Aston Villa are reportedly fending off interest for Jhon Duran from West Ham United, who have seen a £40m bid for the Colombian striker rejected.
